mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS workPlanId, s.id AS scheduleId, s.slot, s.maximum AS maximum, s.num AS num FROM doctor_work_plan p JOIN doctor_work_plan_schedule s ON p.id =work_plan_id WHERE p.date = STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND p.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY s.id

SELECT p.id AS workPlanId, p.doctor_id AS doctorId, p.dept_sub_id AS deptSubId, DATE_FORMAT(p.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, s.id AS scheduleId, s.slot, s.maximum AS maximum, s.num AS num, FORMAT(IFNULL(dp.price_1, 0), 2) AS amount FROM doctor_work_plan p JOIN doctor_work_plan_schedule s ON p.id = s.work_plan_id LEFT JOIN doctor_price dp ON p.doctor_id = dp.doctor_id WHERE p.id = #{workPlanId} AND s.id = #{scheduleId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_work_plan_schedule s JOIN medical_registration r ON r.doctor_schedule_id = s.id SET s.num = s.num - 1 WHERE r.out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}
